name: ASUS PRO WS W880-ACE SE Workstation ATX Motherboard - Socket LGA 1851 - 2x PCIe 5.0 x16 - 1x PCIe 4.0 x16 - Support DDR5-9066+(OC) - 4x M.2 Slots - Thunderbolt 4 Type-C - HDMI 2.1 - BMC Management Port - Dual 2.5G LAN - BMC VGA Port - USB 20Gbp Type-C
shortName: ASUS PRO WS W880-ACE SE Workstation ATX Motherboard - Socket LGA 1851
description: Professional workstation ATX motherboard with LGA 1851 socket supporting high-memory configurations and dual LAN.
